title: Kohleria × hillii
taxonomy: Kohleria × hillii is a hybrid species within the Kohleria genus of flowering plants. The genus Kohleria belongs to the family Gesneriaceae, which is a group of tropical plants. Kohleria × hillii can be classified as a member of the order Lamiales, a large and diverse order of flowering plants. The classification of Kohleria × hillii includes the kingdom Plantae, which encompasses all types of plants. intro: Kohleria × hillii, also known as Hill's Kohleria, is a hybrid species of flowering plant belonging to the Gesneriaceae family. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various infections and diseases. The bioactive constituents of Kohleria × hillii include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
